lanes.label: Source Fidelity
lanes.description: Checks whether metadata, population, exposure, endpoint, result, safety, and locator fields match the cited source.

lanes.label: Population Directness
lanes.description: Checks whether claims correctly distinguish healthy men age 30 to 50 from ED/BPH, PAH, older-adult, cognitive-impairment, cardiovascular, or mixed clinical populations.

lanes.label: Exposure Directness
lanes.description: Checks dose, timing, duration, daily versus as-needed use, pde5_agent, agent_directness_to_tadalafil, and whether class-transfer limits justify any use of non-tadalafil PDE5-inhibitor evidence in tadalafil claims.

lanes.label: Endpoint Validity
lanes.description: Checks whether endpoints are valid for the claim, especially cognitive instruments, mood scales, cardiovascular surrogates, exercise protocols, longevity proxies, and adverse-event capture.

lanes.label: Safety And Risk Framing
lanes.description: Checks that contraindications, interactions, adverse events, dose limits, and cardiovascular-status warnings are visible and current.

lanes.label: Confounding And Bias
lanes.description: Checks confounding by indication, healthy-user effects, reverse causation, missing comparator groups, selective outcome reporting, and small-study limitations.

lanes.label: Synthesis Overreach
lanes.description: Checks whether public claims exceed the support map, imply off-label medical advice, collapse agent-specific evidence, or convert mechanistic, surrogate, observational, or adjacent-drug evidence into unsupported tadalafil benefit claims.

lanes.label: Search Protocol
lanes.description: Checks search queries, databases, dates, inclusion/exclusion criteria, screening decisions, deduplication, and included source IDs when a search protocol is staged.
